argument: Everyone is buying this phone, so it must be the best.
You shouldn't listen to Alex's argument about nutrition because he is overweight.
If we allow students to redo this test, soon they will expect to redo every assignment.
We should not listen to her opinion on politics because she is just a celebrity.
Either we ban social media completely or society will collapse.
My grandfather smoked every day and lived to be 95, so smoking is not harmful.
This policy must be good because a famous actor supports it.
We should reject the proposal because it was suggested by our rival company.
If we allow people to work from home, productivity will eventually disappear.
Nobody has proven that ghosts do not exist, so they must be real.
People who oppose this law clearly hate progress.
You say we should reduce homework, but you just want students to stop learning.
If we raise taxes slightly, the entire economy will collapse.
My friend tried this diet and lost weight, so it must work for everyone.
You cannot trust her research because she works for that company.
All mammals are warm-blooded. Whales are mammals. Therefore whales are warm-blooded.
Exercise improves cardiovascular health according to multiple medical studies.
If it is raining, the ground will be wet. It is raining, therefore the ground is wet.
Studies show that regular sleep improves cognitive performance.
Eating vegetables regularly contributes to better overall health.
